trigger.summary: User asked Noesis to gate a repeated workflow before turning it into a durable artifact.

source_refs.summary: Task thread defining the promote-request gate slice.

candidate_items.summary: Add a reusable gate for promote requests before Noesis creates proposals.
candidate_items.evidence: The current HS workflow needs case-to-gate-to-proposal structure before proposal generation.
candidate_items.reason: The behavior should become a regression check so future promote requests remain reviewable and proposal-only.

expected_regression.scenario: A valid promote request is checked through noesis promote check --json.
expected_regression.acceptance: The command exits 0, reports no errors, and records downstream_execution as not-run with no writes.
